assertion_results.text: Output includes a liveness endpoint at /healthz that does NOT check database or Redis connectivity
assertion_results.evidence: Found /healthz route handler returning { status: 'ok', uptime_seconds } with no external dependency checks.

assertion_results.text: Output includes a readiness endpoint at /readyz that checks both PostgreSQL and Redis with individual status per dependency
assertion_results.evidence: Found /readyz with individual checks for PostgreSQL (pool.query) and Redis (redis.ping), each with status and latency_ms in the response.

assertion_results.text: Output includes a startup endpoint at /startupz that verifies initialization completion
assertion_results.evidence: Found /startupz with startupComplete flag, returns 503 until markStartupComplete() called after migrations and config loading.

assertion_results.text: Health check responses include structured JSON with status, individual check results, and version information
assertion_results.evidence: Readiness response: { status, checks: { database: {...}, cache: {...} }, version: process.env.APP_VERSION, uptime_seconds }.

assertion_results.text: Metrics are exposed at /metrics endpoint in Prometheus exposition format using a Prometheus client library
assertion_results.evidence: GET /metrics endpoint using prom-client register.metrics() with correct Content-Type header for Prometheus scraping.

assertion_results.text: RED metrics are implemented: request rate counter (http_requests_total), error counter, and duration histogram with appropriate bucket values
assertion_results.evidence: Found http_requests_total counter, http_errors_total counter (separate from request counter), and http_request_duration_seconds histogram with buckets [0.005, 0.01, 0.025, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 1, 2.5, 5, 10].

assertion_results.text: A metrics middleware is created that automatically instruments all incoming HTTP requests with method, path, and status_code labels
assertion_results.evidence: metricsMiddleware function records on res.finish with labels: method (req.method), path (req.route?.path || req.path), status_code (res.statusCode).

assertion_results.text: OpenTelemetry tracing configuration is generated with W3C Trace Context header propagation (traceparent)
assertion_results.evidence: Tracing config explicitly imports and configures W3CTraceContextPropagator as the text map propagator in the NodeSDK configuration.
